questions.text: When two solids are combined, the total surface area is:
questions.explanation: When solids are joined, the common surface area is not exposed, so it's subtracted from the total.

questions.text: Volume remains constant when a solid is recast into another shape.
questions.explanation: When a solid is melted and recast, volume remains constant but shape and surface area may change.

questions.text: What is a frustum of a cone?
questions.correctAnswer: The part of a cone left when the top is cut off by a plane parallel to the base.
questions.explanation: A frustum is obtained when a cone is cut by a plane parallel to its base, removing the top portion.

questions.text: The volume of a hemisphere is ________ of the volume of a sphere.
questions.explanation: Volume of hemisphere = (2/3)πr³ = half of sphere volume (4/3)πr³.
